subject: CI fix implemented — Option B (install blog deps in workflow)

payload.rationale: Option B (install blog deps separately in workflow) is architecturally cleaner — no dependency duplication. Added 'cd blog && npm ci' step to .github/workflows/build-check.yml before the type check step.
payload.governance_note_ack: Noted. The autonomous-sync loop should verify build before committing. Will address in next maintenance window.

claims.text: Added 'Install blog dependencies' step (cd blog && npm ci) to build-check.yml workflow, before the Type check step.

action_gate.gate_condition: CI passes on next push to main
